questions.text: Which of the following is NOT a source of fresh water?
questions.explanation: Oceans contain saltwater, not fresh water. Fresh water sources include rivers, lakes, ponds, glaciers, and groundwater.

questions.text: The water cycle is also known as the hydrological cycle.
questions.explanation: The water cycle (hydrological cycle) describes the continuous movement of water on, above, and below the Earth's surface.

questions.text: Name the process by which water changes from liquid to vapor.
questions.explanation: Evaporation is the process where liquid water changes into water vapor due to heat from the sun or other sources.

questions.text: The conversion of water vapor into liquid water is called ________.
questions.explanation: Condensation is the process where water vapor cools and changes back into liquid water, forming clouds, dew, or fog.
